title: Smart Money
writer: Kubec Glasmon, John Bright, Lucien Hubbard
actors: Edward G. Robinson, James Cagney, Evalyn Knapp
plot: A Greek barber has uncommon skills in playing poker and soon rises in the seedy world of illegal gambling, but pretty blondes remain his Achilles' heel.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 1 nomination total
